title: Suspension of the manufacture for sale, sale and distribution of Pioglitazone and all formulations containing Pioglitazone for human use_Section

And whereas, the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to regulate the way of suspension of manufacture for sale, sale and distribution of the said drug in the country in public interest; Now therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby suspends the manufacture for sale, sale and distribution of the following drug with immediate effect :— ‘‘Pioglitazone and all formulations containing Pioglitazone for human use’’. [F. No. 4-01/2011-DC/Piogl] ARUN K. PANDA, Jt. Secy.
